title: What’s causing an engine shake in my 10-year-old SUV?
author: John Paul
bullets: A 2016 Audi Q5 experiences engine shaking; check engine and EPC lights indicate potential engine misfire.
Car Doctor advises against driving the faulty vehicle to avoid further damage and suggests towing it to a mechanic.
The shaking issue could be related to a misfire, often signaled by a flashing check engine light.

title: 5 takeaways as Red Sox fall flat against Rays on Mother’s Day
author: Trevor Hass
bullets: The Boston Red Sox lost 4-1 to the Tampa Bay Rays at Fenway Park on Mother's Day, falling to 17-23 this season.
Payton Tolle started for the Red Sox, allowing three earned runs over five innings in an emotionally charged game.
Willson Contreras left the game with a right-hand contusion after being hit by a pitch, affecting the team's depth.

title: Boston gang members, associates facing slew of firearm, drug trafficking charges
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: Eight members of Columbia Point Dawgs and Johnston Road gangs face firearm and drug trafficking charges, say federal authorities.
Charges include unlawful firearm dealing, possession of a machine gun, and distribution of fentanyl and cocaine base.
Seized items include 18 firearms, 20 machine gun conversion devices, over a kilogram of fentanyl, and crack cocaine.

title: Photos: Scenes from a fun, but soggy, Saturday in Greater Boston
author: Boston.com Staff
bullets: LEGO Group's Duckling Day held at Boston Common featured activities inspired by 'Make Way for Ducklings'.
Somerville's PorchFest showcased live performances on porches, including Charlie & Audrey and Friends.
Mojo Boston Music Festival at City Hall Plaza offered a 10-hour event with contemporary sound and urban art.

title: New Bedford uncle pleads guilty to killing nephew during family altercation
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: Juan Padilla-Santana, 43, from New Bedford, pleaded guilty to manslaughter for fatally stabbing his nephew, Omil Padilla-Corsino.
The stabbing occurred on August 24, 2024, during an argument at a South Street apartment in New Bedford.
Padilla-Santana was sentenced to 12 ½ to 17 ½ years in prison; he initially faced a second-degree murder charge.

title: 3 takeaways from the Revolution’s 2-1 comeback win against the Philadelphia Union
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: New England Revolution came from behind to win 2-1 against Philadelphia Union at Gillette Stadium.
Goals from Luca Langoni and Carles Gil secured Revolution's best home start in club's MLS history.
Revolution remain undefeated at home and will face first-place Nashville next in Eastern Conference play.

title: ‘SNL’ recap: Best moments from Matt Damon hosting ‘Saturday Night Live’
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: Matt Damon hosted 'SNL' on May 9, marking his third time as host, with Noah Kahan as musical guest.
Damon's standout moments included a Mother's Day monologue, a 'Mom movie' trailer, and a fast-talking auctioneer sketch.
Aziz Ansari returned as FBI Director Kash Patel in the cold open, featuring Damon as Brett Kavanaugh and Colin Jost as Pete Hegseth.

title: Tracy McGrady clarifies comments about Jaylen Brown’s ‘frustration’ with Celtics
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: Tracy McGrady clarified he had no recent discussions with Jaylen Brown about frustration with the Celtics.
McGrady observed Brown's behavior in the media, citing post-game comments and a Twitch fine following Game 7.
Brown publicly expressed satisfaction in Boston, indicating he enjoyed the season and wishes to stay for a decade.

title: Pedro Martinez comments on Red Sox’ decision to reassign Jason Varitek’s role
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: Pedro Martinez commented on Jason Varitek's reassignment within the Red Sox organization, expressing surprise and uncertainty over the decision.
Martinez spoke with former Red Sox manager Alex Cora but has not yet discussed the situation with Varitek.
Red Sox legends, including Martinez, returned to Fenway Park for the 125th anniversary of its first home game.

title: Report: Giannis Antetokounmpo would like to be traded to ‘true contender’
author: Colin McCarthy
bullets: Giannis Antetokounmpo prefers to be traded to a 'true championship contender' and remain in the Eastern Conference.
The Celtics are potential contenders to acquire Antetokounmpo, with Jaylen Brown and Jayson Tatum as possible trade pieces.
Antetokounmpo praised Celtics coach Joe Mazzulla, adding to speculation about his interest in joining Boston.
